name: Api → Respond
description: This action sends a response back to the client that called the user-defined action. It can report success/error status and optionally include JSON data.

config_entries.label: Data
config_entries.description: A lambda that populates a JSON object with response data. The lambda receives a `root` variable of type [`JsonObject`](https://arduinojson.org/v7/api/jsonobject/) that you can populate with key-value pairs.

config_entries.label: Error Message
config_entries.description: An error message to include when `success` is `false`. Defaults to an empty string.

config_entries.label: Success
config_entries.description: Whether the action succeeded. Defaults to `true`.
